title: EDEN artifact metadata
description: Per-artifact metadata row recorded by the reference artifact store on a wire-level deposit (07-wire-protocol.md §16; 08-storage.md §5.5). The bytes themselves live behind the opaque artifacts_uri; this row carries only what the fetch endpoint needs — the depositing principal (created_by) for the §16.2 ACL plus the byte size and content type for delivery. A reference-binding detail: the protocol's artifact-store contract (08-storage.md §5.1–§5.4) is byte-level and does not mandate this row.

opaque_id.description: Server-minted unguessable artifact identifier (reference deployment: secrets.token_hex(16) → 32 lowercase hex chars). Single-segment and path-separator-free, so it can never carry a path-traversal payload. Opaque to clients (02-data-model.md §1.5).

created_by.description: The depositing principal, stamped from the authenticated bearer (07-wire-protocol.md §13.3): a worker's worker_id, or the literal `admin` sentinel for an admin bearer. This is the sole ACL key for the §16.2 fetch authorization.

size_bytes.description: Byte length of the deposited content.

content_type.description: MIME content type recorded at deposit and echoed on fetch.
